It’s also basically an illegal website, as children gamble for hats and robux. Paying money for some in game currency and not being able to gain it virtually for free, they only want to make money, and the only reason why they ride the shit out of you is because you’re exposing everything wrong with this platform, they lose money, so they’re suing you for the money THEY want, for their own use and to not even put it into their platform. Have you seen updates to the platform at all that actually improves anything, such as moderation? No, they keep it all to themselves.', 'It\'s so sad that an youtuber tries to be funny and troll with potentially dangerous lies and people defend him because "poor youtuber ;(( big company bad" I honestly hope Roblox tries again and wins this, you play with fire you get hurt. I hate "trolls" (childish people who can\'t get any attention besides making a fool out of themselves) and it\'s time people stop ignoring them. You ruin other people\'s fun and waste their time just for your own personal enjoyment, most selfish entitled bitches I\'ve ever seen. It\'s time someone put them in their place, yes 1.6 million is big but it\'s so it sets an example. Roblox wouldn\'t sue based on lies and "exaggerations". You guys are downplaying the problem, roblox is 100% right, but you don\'t see it because "it\'s a troll! It\'s just a joke! It\'s not that serious ;(( they\'re exageratting". They\'re saying it as it is, jokes can be harmful. What even is the joke here? How tf do people joke about terorrism? Explain what\'s so funny about it. But of course kids and people who have the mentality of a 13 year old will defend this person and say it\'s just a joke. How many jokes ruined lives I wonder, how many "pranks". \n\nit stops being a joke once it\'s about a SERIOUS matter (terrorism/minorities/hurting someone etc.).  Just think about it. Why the FUCK would a MULTI BILLION company care so much about a single guy and want to ruin his life? They don\'t, they were just using their brain and realized it went too far. But of course you retards will believe this guy since you are listening to HIS SIDE OF THE STORY presented FROM HIS PERSPECTIVE. Even a killer could seem like the victim if you listen to what they have to say. Read about both sides, then tell me about how innocent he really is.']
